name: Nova Scotia Dressing
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons Poultry seasoning (to taste) OR 1 teaspoon Sage
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook potatoes about 20 minutes or until soft enough to mash.
2. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl and blend well.
3. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
4. Divide into meal-sized portions. Extra may be frozen.
5. Reheat in the microwave or oven for a few minutes before serving.
